001package net.okocraft.box.feature.gui.api.menu.paginate;
002
003import net.okocraft.box.feature.gui.api.button.Button;
004import net.okocraft.box.feature.gui.api.menu.AbstractMenu;
005import net.okocraft.box.feature.gui.api.menu.RenderedButton;
006import net.okocraft.box.feature.gui.api.util.TranslationUtil;
007import net.okocraft.box.feature.gui.internal.lang.Displays;
008import org.bukkit.Material;
009import org.bukkit.Sound;
010import org.bukkit.entity.Player;
011import org.bukkit.event.inventory.ClickType;
012import org.bukkit.inventory.meta.ItemMeta;
013import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
014import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
015
016import java.util.ArrayList;
017import java.util.List;
018
019public abstract class AbstractPaginatedMenu<T> extends AbstractMenu implements PaginatedMenu {
020
021    private final int iconsPerPage;
022    private final int maxPage;
023
024    private final List<T> list;
025    private int currentPage = 1;
026
027    private boolean moved = true;
028
029    protected AbstractPaginatedMenu(@NotNull List<T> list) {
030        this.list = list;
031
032        int page = 1;
033        int size = list.size();
034        this.iconsPerPage = (getRows() - 1) * 9;
035
036        while (page * iconsPerPage < size) {
037            page++;
038        }
039
040        this.maxPage = page;
041    }
042
043    @Override
044    public int getCurrentPage() {
045        return currentPage;
046    }
047
048    @Override
049    public boolean hasNext() {
050        return currentPage < maxPage;
051    }
052
053    @Override
054    public boolean hasPrevious() {
055        return 1 < currentPage;
056    }
057
058    @Override
059    public void previous() {
060        if (!hasPrevious()) {
061            throw new IllegalStateException();
062        }
063
064        currentPage--;
065        moved = true;
066    }
067
068    @Override
069    public void next() {
070        if (!hasNext()) {
071            throw new IllegalStateException();
072        }
073
074        currentPage++;
075        moved = true;
076    }
077
078    @Override
079    public void updateMenu(@NotNull Player viewer) {
080        renderPage(viewer);
081        moved = false;
082    }
083
084    @Override
085    public boolean shouldUpdate() {
086        return moved;
087    }
088
089    private void renderPage(@NotNull Player viewer) {
090        int start = (currentPage - 1) * iconsPerPage;
091        int end = start + iconsPerPage;
092
093        var newButtons = new ArrayList<Button>(getRows() * 9);
094
095        for (int i = start, limit = list.size(), slot = 0; i < limit && i < end; i++, slot++) {
096            newButtons.add(createButton(list.get(i), slot));
097        }
098
099        if (hasNext()) {
100            newButtons.add(new PageSwitchButton(true));
101        }
102
103        if (hasPrevious()) {
104            newButtons.add(new PageSwitchButton(false));
105        }
106
107        addAdditionalButtons(viewer, newButtons);
108
109        buttonMap.clear();
110
111        for (var button : newButtons) {
112            buttonMap.put(button.getSlot(), RenderedButton.create(button));
113        }
114
115        buttonMap.values().forEach(button -> button.updateIcon(viewer));
116
117        updated = true;
118    }
119
120    protected abstract @NotNull Button createButton(@NotNull T instance, int slot);
121
122    protected abstract void addAdditionalButtons(@NotNull Player viewer, @NotNull List<Button> buttons);
123
124    private class PageSwitchButton implements Button {
125
126        private final boolean next;
127
128        private PageSwitchButton(boolean next) {
129            this.next = next;
130        }
131
132        @Override
133        public @NotNull Material getIconMaterial() {
134            return Material.ARROW;
135        }
136
137        @Override
138        public int getIconAmount() {
139            return Math.min(currentPage + (next ? 1 : -1), 64);
140        }
141
142        @Override
143        public @Nullable ItemMeta applyIconMeta(@NotNull Player viewer, @NotNull ItemMeta target) {
144            var name = next ? Displays.PAGE_SWITCH_BUTTON_NEXT : Displays.PAGE_SWITCH_BUTTON_PREVIOUS;
145
146            target.displayName(TranslationUtil.render(name, viewer));
147
148            return target;
149        }
150
151        @Override
152        public int getSlot() {
153            return next ? getRows() * 9 - 1 : (getRows() - 1) * 9;
154        }
155
156        @Override
157        public void onClick(@NotNull Player clicker, @NotNull ClickType clickType) {
158            if (next) {
159                if (hasNext()) {
160                    next();
161                }
162            } else {
163                if (hasPrevious()) {
164                    previous();
165                }
166            }
167
168            clicker.playSound(clicker.getLocation(), Sound.BLOCK_LEVER_CLICK, 100f, 1.5f);
169        }
170    }
171}
